title: Block Renderer
description: Renders PNGs of blocks and items on-demand
body:
Port of Block Renderer to 1.14+

For 1.14-1.15 [Click Here](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/block-renderer)
For 1.7.10-1.12 & Alternative 1.16 Version [Click Here](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/blockrenderer) --- ### Description:
A simple mod that can render blocks, items and maps on-demand with a keybind (**default `**).

**Note:** Block Renderer **1.4.1+** for Minecraft 1.16.2+ will work on both Fabric and Forge. --- ### (1.4.0+) - Hover over an item and press the key to render it and save it to a file. - Hold SHIFT while pressing the render key to open a GUI that allows you to customize a single render. - Hold CTRL while pressing the render key to open a GUI that lets you select your rendering type (Map / Bulk Namespace / Animated). ### (Older Versions) - Hover over an item and press the key to render it and save it to a file. - Hold SHIFT while pressing the render key to open a GUI that allows you to customize a single render. - Hold CTRL while pressing the render key to open a GUI that lets you enter a comma-separated list of namespaces to render. The default render size is 512x512 with the maximum being 2048x2048 and minimum of 16x16. --- ### Installation: - Forge 1.16.2+ : No extra requirements. - Fabric 1.16.2+ : Requires FabricAPI @ 0.18.x to be installed
